ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Common or scientific name of the resource */,
  "resource_phylum" TEXT /* Phylum classification of the resource */,
  "resource_class" TEXT /* Class classification of the resource */,
  "resource_order" TEXT /* Order classification of the resource */,
  "resource_family" TEXT /* Family classification of the resource */,
  "resource_genus" TEXT /* Genus classification of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the resource */,
  "resource_habitat" TEXT /* The typical habitat of the resource */,
  "resource_diet" TEXT /* The diet of the resource if applicable */,
  "resource_conservation_status" TEXT /* The conservation status of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the consumer */,
  "consumer_name" TEXT /* Common or scientific name of the consumer */,
  "consumer_phylum" TEXT /* Phylum classification of the consumer */,
  "consumer_class" TEXT /* Class classification of the consumer */,
  "consumer_order" TEXT /* Order classification of the consumer */,
  "consumer_family" TEXT /* Family classification of the consumer */,
  "consumer_genus" TEXT /* Genus classification of the consumer */,
  "consumer_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the consumer */,
  "consumer_habitat" TEXT /* The typical habitat of the consumer */,
  "consumer_diet" TEXT /* The diet of the consumer */,
  "consumer_conservation_status" TEXT /* The conservation status of the consumer */,
  "consumer_lifecycle" TEXT /* The lifecycle stages of the consumer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource involved in the interaction */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer involved in the interaction */,
  "resource_n" REAL /* Parameter associated with the resource */,
  "resource_m" REAL /* Parameter associated with the resource */,
  "consumer_n" REAL /* Parameter associated with the consumer */,
  "consumer_m" REAL /* Parameter associated with the consumer */,
  "resource_method" TEXT /* Method of resource interaction */,
  "consumer_method" TEXT /* Method of consumer interaction */,
  "n_records" INTEGER /* Number of records documenting the interaction */,
  "link_evidence" TEXT /* Link to evidence or supporting documentation */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Source documentation for the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_location" TEXT /* The location where the interaction was observed */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* The date when the interaction was observed */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES evidence_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or reference for the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of source (e.g., journal article, book, field notes) */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* A link to the source document if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., predation, competition) */,
  "interaction_type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)
